channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Fitbit is finally ditching the screen, and that's exactly what fitness trackers needed  MakeUseOf
  5. A screenless Fitbit is coming soon, as Google joins Polar and Amazfit on the Whoop-style wearable bandwagon  TechRadar

item.title: No More Delays for PS5 Exclusive Saros as It Goes Gold Ahead of Launch Later This Month - Push Square
item.description:
1. No More Delays for PS5 Exclusive Saros as It Goes Gold Ahead of Launch Later This Month  Push Square
  2. Soak Up the Mysterious Atmosphere in Another Tiny Saros PS5 Gameplay Video  Push Square
  3. Saros is done and dusted, and here's when you can play it  altchar.com
  4. Saros Will Feature Multiple Save Slots and the Ability to Pause a Run  IXBT.games
  5. Saros has been made easier than Returnal due to player feedback, though creative director claims its still "a very challenging game"  eurogamer.net

item.title: Remote Desktop support is over. It's time to move to the "Windows App." - Windows Central
item.description:
1. Remote Desktop support is over. It's time to move to the "Windows App."  Windows Central
  2. Microsoft has killed the Remote Desktop app, and its replacement's name isn't great  XDA
  3. Microsoft emphasizes the greatness of Windows App as it retires Remote Desktop client  Neowin
  4. The transition to "Windows App" is complete — good luck searching for that name on Google  inkl.com

item.title: ZERO PARADES: For Dead Spies launches May 21 for PC, later in 2026 for PS5 - gematsu.com
item.description:
1. ZERO PARADES: For Dead Spies launches May 21 for PC, later in 2026 for PS5  gematsu.com
  2. Zero Parades: For Dead Spies is the first Disco Elysium successor to get a release date, will finally be playable this summer  eurogamer.net
  3. Upcoming RPG by Acclaimed Dev PS5 Console Exclusive for Now  playstationlifestyle.net
  4. Zero Parades devs knew they didn't want to make another cop game after Disco Elysium: 'How people think of the police these days, it's a bit different'  pcgamer.com
  5. Zero Parades Interview - ZA/UM writers discuss moving on from Disco Elysium, literary genres, and changes in the creative team  rpgsite.net

item.title: I've taken hundreds of photos with the Galaxy S26 Ultra. Here's how it compares to its biggest competitors - androidcentral.com

item.title: Apple Says Three More Products Are Now 'Vintage' or 'Obsolete' - MacRumors
item.description:
